Select a watch face

Mauna Kea

24-hour twilight ring with EOT

Haleakalā

Sunrise & sunset times with alt/az

Hana

Moonrise & moonset times, phase, and alt/az

Chandra

Giant moonphase with alt/az dots

Selene

All about the moon

Geneva

Date ring, moon phase, rise/set times, year & century

Basel

Sidereal time with zodiac dial and eclipse indicator
